sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 0.7g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. fat is basically not the story here.
sections.subtitleText: 0.7g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. fat is basically not the story here.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 80g of carbs. glycemic index is where this starts to get messy. for grains, the carb quality matters much more than the raw number.
sections.subtitleText: 80g of carbs. glycemic index is where this starts to get messy. for grains, the carb quality matters much more than the raw number.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 7.1g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein helps, but not enough if the carb side is weak.
sections.subtitleText: 7.1g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein helps, but not enough if the carb side is weak.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: zinc at 10% daily value stands out most. useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: zinc at 10% daily value stands out most. useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: useful staple energy source. that matters because grains are often judged by how practical they are in real diets. easy to batch cook at scale. that practicality is part of why grains matter. works as a meal anchor. a lot of value comes from being easy to build around.

displayItems.title: useful staple energy source
displayItems.explanation: That matters because grains are often judged by how practical they are in real diets.

displayItems.title: easy to batch cook at scale
displayItems.explanation: That practicality is part of why grains matter.

sections.subtitleText: on the plus side: useful staple energy source. that matters because grains are often judged by how practical they are in real diets. easy to batch cook at scale. that practicality is part of why grains matter. works as a meal anchor. a lot of value comes from being easy to build around.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: quality can drop fast with processing. the grain category punishes refinement pretty hard. carb load is still the main burden. that is the category risk no grain fully escapes. protein quality is limited. even the better grains usually need pairing.

closing.summary: White Rice does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best only as a light snack base or texture food, not as a strong staple by itself.
closing.useCaseNote: Best only as a light snack base or texture food, not as a strong staple by itself.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in C tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in C tier with an overall score of 30 from a base nutrition score of 30. Context barely changed the result.
